description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a variable S3_BUCKET_NAME set to primeros-pasos-de-python and two stages named pages and deploy. In the pages stage define a pages job that uses the node:8.11.4 Docker image, caches the node_modules/ directory, runs the before_script commands `npm install gitbook-cli -g` and `gitbook install`, then executes `gitbook build . public` and stores the resulting public/ folder as an artifact, and restricts the job to the master branch. In the deploy stage define a deploy job that uses the python:latest Docker image, runs only on the master branch, and runs the script commands `pip install awscli` followed by `aws s3 cp ./ s3://$S3_BUCKET_NAME/public --recursive --include "/public/*"` to upload the public files to the specified S3 bucket.
